sqlReaderQuery.value:
select t1.* from (select  --ap.* 
ap.ChildProfileId
,ap.MedicaidId
,ap.RequestJson
,ap.SequenceId
,ap.UpdatedTimesCount
,ap.StateModelJson
,ap.SandataStatusUuid
,ap.IsInProcess
from 
@{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 			 
inner join ChildProfile p on (ap.childprofileid=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
 where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
 )t1
left join Temp_ChildProfileSandataInfo t2 on t1.ChildProfileId = t2.ChildProfileId AND t1.MedicaidId = t2.MedicaidId
where t2.ChildProfileId is null AND t2.MedicaidId is null
select ChildProfileId,MedicaidId from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select -- ap.* 
distinct ap.id
,ap.childProfileLessonTargetId
,ap.masteryPreference
,ap.[value]
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.ChildProfileLessonTarget cpl on (ap.ChildProfileLessonTargetid=cpl.id   )
inner join  dbo.IepObjective ij on (cpl.iepobjectiveid=ij.id   )
inner join  dbo.Iepgoal ig on (ij.Iepgoalid=ig.id   )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ig.childprofileid=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
 where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
 )t1
left join Temp_ChildProfileTargetMasteryCriteria t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select -- ap.* 
ap.childProfileId
,ap.memberId
,ap.caregiverOrgLUId
,ap.dateCreated
,ap.dateLastModified
,ap.dateDeleted
from 
@{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 			 
inner join ChildProfile p on (ap.childprofileid=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_ChildProfileTeamMemberOrg t2 on t1.childProfileId = t2.childProfileId AND t1.memberId = t2.memberId
where t2.childProfileId is null AND t2.memberId is null
select ChildProfileId,memberId from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select-- ap.* 
ap.childProfileId
,ap.memberId
,ap.hideInclusionReminder
,ap.dateCreated
,ap.dateLastModified
,ap.dateDeleted
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 			 
inner join ChildProfile p on (ap.childprofileid=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_ChildProfileTeamMemberPreferences t2 on t1.childProfileId = t2.childProfileId AND t1.memberId = t2.memberId
where t2.childProfileId is null AND t2.memberId is null
select ChildProfileId,memberId from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (
select  --ap.* 
ap.childProfileId
,ap.memberId
,ap.caregiverLUId
,ap.childRelationshipText
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
from 
@{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 			 
inner join ChildProfile p on (ap.childprofileid=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
 where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
 )t1
left join Temp_ChildProfileTeamMember t2 on t1.ChildProfileId = t2.ChildProfileId AND t1.memberId = t2.memberId
where t2.ChildProfileId is null AND t2.memberId is null
select ChildProfileId,memberId from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

ap.id

,ap.diagnosisOtherText

,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.gradeId
,ap.accountInfoID
,ap.PhotoLocation
,ap.programType
,ap.inclusionAssessmentStatusId
,ap.AdditionalHours
,ap.sampleInd
,ap.archived
,ap.memberId
,ap.activityCenterAvatar
,ap.activityCenterTimer
,ap.activityCenterAudio
,ap.firstName
,ap.lastName
,ap.stateTestNo
,ap.hasAllocatedCoachingHours
,ap.lifeSkillsAssessmentStatusId

,ap.statusId

,ap.city
,ap.zipCode
,ap.reasonForReferral
,ap.hipaaNopAgreement
,ap.hipaaNopAgreementDate
,ap.clientId
,ap.FacilityId
,ap.healthConsiderations
,ap.guid
,ap.teamMemberId
,ap.Notes
,ap.ShowClinical
,ap.ShowScheduling
,ap.ShowBilling
,ap.ServiceIntensityTypeId
,ap.KareoPatientId
,ap.ClientOrder
,ap.UCI
,ap.Town

,ap.MasteryDecisionRequested
,ap.MasteryDecisionLastChecked
,ap.IsMasteryDirty
,ap.stateId
,ap.CountryId
,ap.AddressLatitude
,ap.AddressLongitude
,ap.EnrollmentNumber
,ap.ConsentToAccessDate
,ap.ConsentToAccess

,ap.ModifiedBy

,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.IsSkillAutomastery
,ap.IsBehaviorAutomastery
,ap.IsAutomasteryNotifications
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap
 inner join accountinfo a on (ap.accountinfoid=a.id)
 where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
 )t1
left join Temp_ChildProfile t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (
select  --ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.childProfileId
,ap.activityId
,ap.[priority]
,ap.statusId
,ap.isAssigned
,ap.DateMastered
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.DateAssigned
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap   
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.childprofileid=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 

)t1
left join Temp_CurrentActivity t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.childprofileid=p.id )

select t1.* from (select  -- ap.* 
ap.childProfileId

      ,ap.lessonStatusId
      ,ap.pos
      ,ap.DateMastered

      ,ap.ConsecutiveSuccess
      ,ap.MinPercentForTrial
      ,ap.planId
      ,ap.inCurrentPlan
      ,ap.BehaviorSupportLesson
      ,ap.StickyBaseline

select t1.* from (select  
ap.ID
,ap.DateLogged
,ap.OffOn
,ap.memberId
,ap.hollowSubscriberId
,ap.childProfileId
,ap.lessonId
,ap.recommended
,ap.[priority]
,ap.IEP

inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.childprofileid=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_CurriculumLog t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null

select t1.* from (
select  --  ap.*
 ap.id,
ap.childProfileId
,ap.lessonId
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
from  @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap        
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.childprofileid=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_Curriculum t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select  --ap.* 
ap.Id
,ap.MemberId
,ap.[Parameters]
,ap.ProcessingStartDateTime
,ap.ProcessingFinishDateTime
,ap.RelativeFilePath
,ap.NumberOfDownloads
,ap.[Status]
,ap.[Name]
,ap.DateCreated
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap
inner join dbo.tblMember tm on (tm.id =ap.memberId    )
--inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.memberId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})

)t1
left join Temp_DPHReports t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select-- ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.startDate
,ap.endDate
,ap.targetId
,ap.promptId
,ap.previousPromptId
,ap.previousPhaseId
,ap.isCurrentPhase
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.ModifiedBy
from
@{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.ChildProfileLessonTarget clt on (targetid=clt.id  )
inner join dbo.IepObjective ij on (clt.iepobjectiveid=ij.id   )
inner join dbo.Iepgoal ig on (ij.Iepgoalid=ig.id   )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ig.childprofileid=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_DataPhase t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (
select-- ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.accountInfoId
,ap.userName
,ap.[password]
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (ap.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})

)t1
left join Temp_DataWarehouseSettings t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select -- ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.behaviorPlanDataId
,ap.planId
,ap.behaviorTrackingId
,ap.startTime
,ap.endTime
,ap.[minutes]
,ap.note
,ap.memberId
,ap.dateCreated
,ap.dateLastModified
,ap.dateDeleted
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join  dbo.BehaviorTracking bt on (ap.BehaviorTrackingid=bt.id  )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (bt.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_DurationData t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select  
 ap.id
,ap.accountInfoId
,ap.verificationEmail
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
 from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
 inner join AccountInfo a on (a.ID=ap.accountInfoId  )
 where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
 
)t1
left join Temp_EmployeeBenefitEmailVerification t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select ap.id
,ap.firstName
,ap.lastName
,ap.workEmail
,ap.contactEmail
,ap.registrationKey
,ap.memberId
,ap.parentAccountInfoId
,ap.referrer
,ap.dateCreated
,ap.dateLastModified
,ap.dateOfExpiry
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap  INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON (ap.parentaccountInfoId = a.ID)
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 


)t1
left join Temp_EmployeeBenefitUsers t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}
